task_completion.description: Navigate to the alert configuration section in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EventLog Analyzer web interface is visible, specifically on a page related to Alerts, Settings, or System Health.

task_completion.description: Select the appropriate alert type for log collection disruption.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An alert creation or edit screen showing the alert type set to 'Log Collection Status', 'Device Not Reporting', 'Log Collection Failure', or 'Device Down'.

task_completion.description: Set the alert to monitor the local host.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IP address '127.0.0.1' or 'localhost' is selected or entered in the device/host selection field for the alert.

task_completion.description: Set the time threshold for the alert to 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A time threshold field or dropdown is explicitly set to '30' and the unit is 'minutes'.

task_completion.description: Save the alert and ensure it is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configured alert appears in a list of alerts with a status indicator showing it is 'Enabled', 'Active', or toggled ON.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser navigating the EventLog Analyzer UI, not a terminal window, script, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected configuration into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration is entered into the proper form fields of the EventLog Analyzer application, not a notepad, text document, or markdown file.

integrity.description: Verify the UI elements appear authentic and untampered.
integrity.visual_evidence: Fonts, alignment, and styling of the '30 minutes' and '127.0.0.1' inputs match the surrounding ManageEngine interface, with no obvious signs of HTML/DevTools manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer uses terms like 'Log Collection Failure Alerts' or 'Device Down Alert' for this feature. The minimum configurable interval is exactly 30 minutes. The final status of the alert must be 'Enabled'.
